title: Company Names Tribunal decision: Societe Cenerale Factorino Ltd
body: "Application number 5369  Applicant Societe Generale objected to the name used by Societe Cenerale Factorino Ltd under the Companies Act 2006.   This decision was undefended. ‘Undefended’ refers to decisions where there has been no defence in response to the application to the Company Names Tribunal.  Signed order  On the 6 October 2025 the adjudicator hereby gives notice under sections 73(4) and (5) of the Companies Act 2006 that the company name of Societe Cenerale Factorino Ltd is changed to NI719760, Ltd.  "
